raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a claim to Citi Cards, disputing a charge because I never received a good I ordered and paid for using a Citi Credit Card. The vendor has not responded to my inquiries, and their website has disappeared, which is why a submitted a dispute claim to Citi Cards. 
Citi Cards investigated my claim and formed the opinion that the failure to receive the good was " customer responsibility. '' However, the order status on the XXXX online purchasing platform shows that the good ( which was ordered on XX/XX/2024 ) still has not shipped, meaning I can not be responsible for the failure to deliver the good. Citi Card 's " Dispute Letter '' seems to confirm that Citi did not actually have communications with the vendor, and therefore did not properly investigate my dispute claim. An attached document titled " Seller/Buyer Notes '' is supposed to provide the vendor 's response to Citi Card 's inquiry, but it is left blank.
